results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed's Interest Rate Decision: April 29, 2026 - dshort - Advisor Perspectives
FOMC Meeting 2026 Highlights: Fed Interest Rates Stays 3.75%
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board

summary: FOMC held benchmark rate at 3.5%-3.75% on April 29, 2026, in an 8-4 split vote — most dissent since October 1992. Inflation described as elevated partly due to rising global energy prices. Powell signaled he will remain on the Board of Governors indefinitely after this likely final press conference. Markets pricing zero rate moves in 2026 and well into 2027.
